name: EU Regulations MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from Ansvar Systems for EU regulatory compliance. Covers 49 EU regulations with full-text search including GDPR, NIS2, DORA (Digital Operational Resilience Act), EU AI Act, Cyber Resilience Act (CRA), and more. Enables AI compliance agents to query EU regulatory requirements for compliance programs, gap analysis, and regulatory interpretation.
use_cases: Querying GDPR requirements for data protection compliance agents
Researching NIS2 and DORA requirements for financial sector compliance agents
Interpreting EU AI Act obligations for AI governance and compliance agents
Cross-regulation compliance gap analysis from regulatory affairs agents
not_for: National EU member state law (covers EU-level regulations, not country implementations)
Definitive legal compliance determination — always verify with qualified EU legal counsel
best_when: A compliance or legal team needs AI agents to query and apply EU-level regulations — GDPR, NIS2, DORA, AI Act, CRA — during compliance programs, gap assessments, or regulatory interpretation work.
avoid_when: You need country-specific national implementations of EU directives (use country-specific law MCPs). EU directives are implemented differently in each member state.

auth.notes: No authentication required — accesses public EU legislation databases.

pricing.notes: Free open source from Ansvar Systems. EU regulations are publicly accessible.

known_agent_gotchas: 49 EU regulations is broad — test which specific regulations your use case requires for depth of coverage
EU regulations are updated — verify the MCP's regulation text is current for compliance-critical interpretations
DORA and AI Act are recently enacted — verify regulatory text freshness for these newer frameworks
Ansvar Systems specializes in compliance tooling — higher quality than typical law MCPs for EU regulation context
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public EU regulation text — non-sensitive. No auth. HTTPS. Always verify regulatory interpretations with qualified EU legal counsel for formal compliance programs.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public regulation data. No auth. HTTPS. Compliance research tool — legal expert validation required.
